channel.title: blog on 土豆泥的博客
channel.description: Recent content in blog on 土豆泥的博客

item.title: Tag_Category
item.description: In your config.toml = 1 2 3 [taxonomies] tag = "tags" category = "categories" Then in the yaml front matter for content/blog/examplepost.md: 1 2 3 title: My Blog Post categories: [development, publishing] tags: [hugo,content,static site generator]

item.title: Hugo博客使用方式
item.description: Hugo 博客使用方法 安装 hugo 查看 hugo 版本 hugo version ls -l 查看文件中有哪些文件 hugo new site myblog 创建 blog 下载主题 git clone https://github.com/flysnow-org/maupassant-hugo themes/maupassant hugo server -t maupassant –buildDrafts 打开/启动博客 部署远端 hugo –theme=maupassant –baseUrl="https://tudourocky.github.io/” –buildDrafts 创建新博客 hugo new post/blog.md public 将 public 文件夹推到 github 上 git init git add git commit -m “我的 hugo 博客的第一次提交” git remote add origin https://github.com/tudourocky/tudourocky.github.io.git git push -u origin master 更新博客方法 新建一个 markdo
